creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
>> firefox shows wrong audio capture device list: a 
>> capture-only device isn't shown, playback-only 
>> devices are shown as capture devices

Is that, specifically, still an issue? 

> … Firefox 84.0 shows a correct list of devices in "Microphone to share" for https://www.onlinemictest.com/ …
